title: xiphion fimbriatum

It is known for its potential health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. The therapeutic actions of Xiphion fimbriatum are attributed to its bioactive constituents, such as flavonoids and saponins, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities.
